objective: Implement the third #298 child slice: classify and intake seek-and-ponder into governance registry, graph/wiki, and validation coverage without downstream product-repo writes.
scope_boundary: Add seek-and-ponder to docs/governed_repos.json with explicit lifecycle, governance, owner, rationale, review date, and issue evidence.
Add seek-and-ponder to docs/graphify_targets.json and produce governance-hosted graph/wiki artifacts from the local checkout.
Inspect seek-and-ponder front-door docs, workflows, CODEOWNERS, default branch, branch protection, rulesets, recent check history, and open governance follow-ups.
Open downstream seek-and-ponder issue(s) before any downstream repo writes are required.
Add issue-backed planning, exception, cross-review, execution-scope, backlog, and progress artifacts for #311.
out_of_scope: Adding EmailAssistant to the registry, which remains #312.
Reconciling all registry-driven README/STANDARDS surfaces, which remains #313.
Claiming final org-wide governance e2e completion.
research_summary: Issue #298 requires every active org repository to be represented in governance. #309 made live drift visible, and #310 made classifications machine-checkable. Live inventory shows seek-and-ponder is active, private, on default branch main, and missing from the governed repo registry. The local checkout already has CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CODEX.md, progress/registry/data/service/fail-fast docs, CODEOWNERS, dependabot, and active governance workflows. Required-check hardgate and memory participation need repo-local follow-up, opened as seek-and-ponder#23.

sprints.name: Registry Intake
sprints.goal: Represent seek-and-ponder in the governed repo registry with explicit classification data.
tasks: Classify governance tier, security tier, lifecycle status, and governance status.
Set subsystem flags for graphify, sweep, metrics, Codex ingestion, compendium, raw feed sync, and code governance.
Keep memory_integrity disabled until downstream issue #23 resolves bootstrap/adoption.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: seek-and-ponder has registry coverage with explicit classification fields.
Final AC: live org inventory no longer reports seek-and-ponder as missing.

sprints.name: Graph And Governance Evidence
sprints.goal: Produce governance-hosted graph/wiki coverage and record any downstream-only deferrals.
tasks: Run graphify against the local seek-and-ponder checkout and stage graph/wiki artifacts.
Update wiki index graph coverage summary.
Record branch protection, ruleset, workflow, required-check, and memory findings.
Open downstream seek-and-ponder#23 for repo-local required-check and memory bootstrap work.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: graphify target reconciliation passes.
Final AC: graphify/wiki coverage exists in governance or is explicitly deferred with a linked issue.
Final AC: default branch, branch protection, rulesets, workflows, and required-check applicability are validated or deferred by issue.
Final AC: no downstream repo edits occur.

sprints.name: Final E2E Proof
sprints.goal: Prove the #311 intake is compatible with the #298 live-org governance loop before merge.
tasks: Run live org inventory drift check in blocking mode.
Run graphify target show/reconciliation checks for seek-and-ponder.
Run structured plan, execution-scope, backlog sync, Local CI Gate, py_compile, and diff hygiene checks.
Run alternate review before PR publication.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: live org inventory blocking mode reports only EmailAssistant as missing active repo after this slice.
Final AC: Local CI Gate passes for changed paths.
Final AC: #311 remains open unless PR and e2e evidence are linked.
Final AC: parent #298 remains open until final #314 e2e closeout.

specialist_reviews.focus: Registry classification, graph/wiki coverage, downstream write boundary, and #298/#312/#313/#314 sequencing.
specialist_reviews.summary: Claude review accepted the intake with required follow-ups to write the cross-review artifact and record final e2e command outcomes before PR publication.

alternate_model_review.summary: Claude accepted the governance intake with follow-ups that are applied before PR publication.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #311 may add seek-and-ponder to governance registry/graphify/wiki coverage, create validation evidence and planning/scope artifacts, and open downstream seek-and-ponder issues for required repo-local follow-up. It may not edit seek-and-ponder or add EmailAssistant.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Complete registry/graph/wiki intake, run final e2e commands, complete alternate-family review, then open PR for #311.

material_deviation_rules: If seek-and-ponder repo-local edits are needed, stop and move that work to seek-and-ponder#23 or another downstream issue.
If EmailAssistant intake is needed, stop and move that work to #312.
If README/STANDARDS fleet surfaces need full reconciliation, stop and move that work to #313.
If graphify cannot run from the local checkout, keep registry intake and record a linked deferral before PR publication.
If final live inventory does not reduce missing active repos to EmailAssistant only, do not publish.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules, no HITL, e2e testing as final AC
